items.content_html: This AutoHotkey script automates the process of opening card packs in the TCG Card Shop Simulator. Customize the number of packs and hands via a config file, and the script adapts for rare card drops by clicking through when it stops. Simply press 1 to start and 3 to exit. Compatible with game version v0.34.
items.title: mleonardblair/TCGCardShop-Pack-Opener: This AutoHotkey script automates the process of opening card packs in the TCG Card Shop Simulator. Customize the number of packs and hands via a config file, and the script adapts for rare card drops by clicking through when it stops. Simply press 1 to start and 3 to exit. Compatible with game version v0.34.

items.content_html: Trigger Bot Valaranto To use the bot trigger, you will need to install AutoHotkey from the site (https://www.autohotkey.com /) . The trigger can be triggered at any time. Before use, it is better to shoot 1/2 minute yourself. Put a yellow character outline in the game. The trigger starts working when the (Alt) button is pressed
items.title: godi76885/-: Trigger Bot Valaranto To use the bot trigger, you will need to install AutoHotkey from the site (https://www.autohotkey.com /) . The trigger can be triggered at any time. Before use, it is better to shoot 1/2 minute yourself. Put a yellow character outline in the game. The trigger starts working when the (Alt) button is pressed
